'''Vacasor''' was a [[Devaronian/Legends|Devaronian]] merchant during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]].

==Biography==
Vacasor, a merchant and scout, bought the ''[[Merasy]]'', a [[Nova-Drive]] [[3-Z light freighter]] that had been previously owned by [[Geld Bernar]] and [[Iep Tumu]] before him. Vacasor replaced passengers' space with cargo decks but was bad at performing any further maintenance.<ref name="Stock Ships" />

Vacasor intended to circumvent [[Known Space]] through little-used routes that were rich in [[Pirate/Legends|piracy]]. He hired a shrewd, experienced [[Ithorian/Legends|Ithorian]] merchant, [[Naneb Pefan]], to serve as his co-pilot. Pefan insisted in improving the [[Deflector shield/Legends|shields]].<ref name="Stock Ships" />

A bad trader himself, Vacasor remained in business though the considerable business skills of his co-pilot.<ref name="Stock Ships" />
